title: Carved 3D Pumpkin for Ashen16x
description: This pack adds a 3D carved effect to the Ashen16x pumpkin and jack o' lantern.
body:
![3D Carved Pumpkin Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18d6b7605aa76a3ab516f3e28ea0d6117c58d4a8_0.webp)
Add a carved 3D effect to Ashen's pumpkin and jack o' lantern!


Place this above Ashen in your resource pack load order.
(This was made specifically for, and therefore requires, [Ashen16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen)) Credits: [Aim__Boot](https://modrinth.com/user/Aim_Boot) for creating the fantastic Ashen16x
